goal: Layer CRUD + bi-temporal queries + hot-staging writes on top of the WO-0011 §12.1 SQLite schema so downstream symbol-resolution and extraction-pipeline work (P1-W4-F03/F04) unblocks.
plan_summary: Extend crates/ucil-core/src/knowledge_graph.rs with typed Entity/Relation structs and CRUD helpers (upsert_entity, get_entity_by_qualified_name, list_entities_by_file, upsert_relation, list_relations_by_source). Add a bi-temporal `get_entity_as_of(qualified_name, at)` that honours the `t_valid_from`/`t_valid_to` columns. All mutators route through the existing execute_in_transaction chokepoint. For F08, add hot_observations / hot_convention_signals / hot_architecture_deltas write paths that go through BEGIN IMMEDIATE first, plus a `checkpoint_wal()` helper that runs `PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE)` at a configurable interval. Tests live in `#[cfg(test)]` inside knowledge_graph.rs so the frozen nextest selectors `knowledge_graph::<name>` match at module level (see DEC-0005/WO-0007 lesson: avoid `mod tests { ... }` wrapper for features whose selector is module-root).
scope_in: crates/ucil-core/src/knowledge_graph.rs — add pub Entity { id, kind, name, qualified_name, file_path, start_line, end_line, signature, doc_comment, language, t_valid_from, t_valid_to, importance, source_tool, source_hash } and pub Relation { id, source_id, target_id, kind, weight, t_valid_from, t_valid_to, source_tool, confidence } structs.

crates/ucil-core/src/knowledge_graph.rs — KnowledgeGraph::upsert_entity(&mut self, Entity) -> Result<i64> honouring the UNIQUE(qualified_name, file_path, t_valid_from) constraint via ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE (t_last_verified = now, access_count += 1).
crates/ucil-core/src/knowledge_graph.rs — KnowledgeGraph::upsert_relation(&mut self, Relation) -> Result<i64>, KnowledgeGraph::list_relations_by_source(&self, i64) -> Result<Vec<Relation>>.

crates/ucil-core/src/knowledge_graph.rs — KnowledgeGraph::get_entity_as_of(&self, qualified_name: &str, at: chrono::DateTime<Utc>) -> Result<Option<Entity>> — WHERE t_valid_from <= at AND (t_valid_to IS NULL OR t_valid_to > at).

crates/ucil-core/src/knowledge_graph.rs — pub struct HotObservation { raw_text, session_id, related_file, related_symbol } and KnowledgeGraph::stage_hot_observation(&mut self, HotObservation) -> Result<i64> using execute_in_transaction (BEGIN IMMEDIATE).

crates/ucil-core/src/knowledge_graph.rs — KnowledgeGraph::checkpoint_wal(&self, mode: WalCheckpointMode) -> Result<(i64,i64,i64)> wrapping PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(<MODE>); enum WalCheckpointMode { Passive, Truncate }.

crates/ucil-core/src/knowledge_graph.rs — module-root tests: test_upsert_and_get_entity, test_bi_temporal_as_of, test_list_entities_by_file, test_upsert_relation_and_list, test_entity_unique_constraint_updates, test_hot_staging_writes, test_wal_checkpoint_truncates. Each declared as `#[cfg(test)] #[test]` at module root (NOT inside a `mod tests { ... }` wrapper) so nextest selectors `knowledge_graph::test_hot_staging_writes` match (P1-W4-F08) and `knowledge_graph::` prefix match covers F02.
crates/ucil-core/Cargo.toml — add `chrono` with `serde` feature if not already present; add `serde` to Entity/Relation derives so future crates can (de)serialize.
crates/ucil-core/src/lib.rs — re-export Entity, Relation, HotObservation, WalCheckpointMode alongside KnowledgeGraph.
scope_out: No symbol-resolution UX (P1-W4-F03 is a separate feature — do not implement; do not add a `resolve_symbol(...)` helper).
No tree-sitter extraction pipeline wiring (P1-W4-F04 is a separate feature).
No MCP tool plumbing (find_definition is P1-W4-F05).
No changes to WO-0011 schema DDL — INIT_SQL stays byte-for-byte identical. If a new column or table is needed, STOP and write an ADR.
No touching ucil-treesitter, ucil-daemon, ucil-lsp-diagnostics, or adapters/*.
No promote-from-hot-to-warm logic (that is a later phase — §12 merge-consolidator).
No `mod tests { ... }` wrapper — tests must live at module root, same pattern as WO-0011's existing tests in knowledge_graph.rs.
No edits to WO-0006 / WO-0008 branches — those are separate WOs still in-flight and owned by their own executors.
No adding a new crate or renaming existing modules.
acceptance: cargo nextest run -p ucil-core 'knowledge_graph::' green (covers F02 selector prefix).
cargo nextest run -p ucil-core knowledge_graph::test_hot_staging_writes green (covers F08 selector).
cargo clippy -p ucil-core -- -D warnings clean (including pedantic + nursery already enabled in WO-0011).
cargo doc -p ucil-core --no-deps exits 0 with no broken intra-doc links.
scripts/reality-check.sh on the branch passes (stash knowledge_graph.rs body → build/test fails → pop → build/test passes).
No test uses #[ignore], .skip(), or todo!()/unimplemented!() anywhere in the diff.
No mocks of rusqlite::Connection — tests open a real on-disk tempfile-backed SQLite db, same pattern WO-0011 established.
acceptance_criteria: cargo nextest run -p ucil-core knowledge_graph:: exits 0 with ≥6 passing tests
cargo nextest run -p ucil-core knowledge_graph::test_hot_staging_writes exits 0 with 1 passing test
context_refs: master-plan:§11 SQLite pragmas (lines 1108-1117 — BEGIN IMMEDIATE chokepoint)
decision:DEC-0005-WO-0006-module-coherence-commits.md (module-coherent commits allowed when splitting would produce non-compiling intermediates)
decision:DEC-0007-remove-cargo-mutants-per-wo-gate.md (no per-WO cargo-mutants — reality-check.sh is the mutation oracle)
rule:.claude/rules/rust-style.md (thiserror, no unwrap, tokio timeouts — but this crate is sync so tokio rules N/A)
phase-log:ucil-build/phase-log/01-phase-1/CLAUDE.md (invariants 4 & 8 — SQLite WAL + busy_timeout already set by WO-0011)
prior-wo:ucil-build/work-orders/0011-knowledge-graph-and-ceqp-test.json (this WO builds on its INIT_SQL + execute_in_transaction helper — do not duplicate or rewrite either)
lessons_applied: WO-0006/WO-0007 lesson: frozen acceptance selectors (e.g. knowledge_graph::test_hot_staging_writes) must match the actual nextest path. Tests MUST live at module root, NOT inside `#[cfg(test)] mod tests { ... }`. Scope_in explicitly enforces this.

DEC-0005 lesson: module-coherent commits are allowed when splitting would produce non-compiling intermediates — but within THIS WO, the incremental commits CAN be split cleanly (struct commit → upsert_entity + test commit → get/list commits → relations commit → bi-temporal commit → hot-staging commit → wal-checkpoint commit). Target ~8 commits.
DEC-0007 lesson: do NOT add `scripts/verify/mutation-gate.sh` or cargo-mutants calls. reality-check.sh is the only mutation oracle.
WO-0011 lesson: pedantic + nursery clippy lints are in effect on ucil-core — authors must clear them, not blanket-allow.
